title: Section 45-I
content: 1[45-I. Functions of Authority.--- The Authority shall discharge the following functions, namely:–-- (i) conduct the elections of the multi-State co-operative society; (ii) supervise, direct and control the matters relating to preparation of electoral rolls; and (iii) such other functions as may be prescribed.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for section 45 (w.e.f. 3-8-2023).
